seoTitle: How to Verify Your Gumroad Seller Account
metaDescription: Learn how to complete Gumroad's seller verification, from submitting identity details to linking your payout method, to unlock payments.
intro: Before Gumroad releases your earnings, most creators need to complete an identity verification step tied to their payout setup. This guide walks through submitting the required information and linking your payout method so your account moves from pending to fully active.

steps.heading: Open your payouts and identity settings
steps.body: Go to your Gumroad settings and find the section covering payouts and identity verification.

steps.heading: Choose your account type
steps.body: Select whether you're registering as an individual or a business, since this affects what information is required.

steps.heading: Submit your details
steps.body: Provide your legal name, address, and any required tax documentation.

steps.heading: Link your payout method
steps.body: Connect your bank account or PayPal so Gumroad can send your earnings once verified.

steps.heading: Check your verification status
steps.body: Watch for a confirmation that your submission has been received and is under review.

faq.question: Why does Gumroad require identity verification?
faq.answer: Verification helps confirm you're eligible to receive payouts and comply with relevant financial regulations.

faq.question: How long does Gumroad seller verification take?
faq.answer: Review times can vary, so check your account status page for updates after submitting.

faq.question: What documents do I need for verification?
faq.answer: You'll typically need identity details and tax documentation, which can vary depending on your country and account type.

faq.question: Can I sell before my account is verified?
faq.answer: You may be able to list products, but payouts are usually held until verification is complete.
